◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_BUSY [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_BUSY (   x)

BUSY 0b0..Not busy 0b1..Busy

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_OFLOW [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_OFLOW (   x)

OFLOW - Overflow in INCR operation flag 0b0..Clear the flag 0b0..No overflow 0b1..No effect 0b1..Overflow

oflow - Overflow in INCR operation flag

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_PRNG_RDY [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_PRNG_RDY (   x)

PRNG_RDY 0b0..Not ready 0b1..Ready

prng_rdy - prng is ready after boot-up-phase

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_ERROR [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_ERROR (   x)

ERROR - Error detected 0b000..Error (all values other than 0x05 indicate ERROR) 0b101..No error

error - Error detected 0b000..ERROR (all values other than 0x05 indicate ERROR) 0b101..NO_ERROR

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA2_BUSY [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA2_BUSY (   x)

SHA2_BUSY 0b0..Not busy 0b1..Busy

sha2_busy - SHA2 is busy

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_IRQ [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_IRQ (   x)

IRQ 0b0..Clear the flag 0b0..No IRQ 0b1..IRQ 0b1..No effect

irq - interrupt detected

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_FIFO_FULL [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_FIFO_FULL (   x)

SHA_FIFO_FULL 0b0..Not full 0b1..Full

sha_fifo_full - SHA FIFO is full(operates in SHA AUTO mode)

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_FIFO_LEVEL [1/3]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_FIFO_LEVEL (   x)

sha_fifo_level - SHA FIFO level

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_ERROR [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_ERROR (   x)

SHA_ERROR 0b0..No error 0b1..Error

sha_error - SHA ERROR

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_KEY_READ_ERR [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_KEY_READ_ERR (   x)

KEY_READ_ERR - KEY SFR READ ERROR, sticky, cleared only with reset or flush 0b0..No error 0b1..Error

key_read_err - KEY SFR READ ERROR, sticky, cleared only with reset or flush

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_KEY_UNWRAP_ERR [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_KEY_UNWRAP_ERR (   x)

KEY_UNWRAP_ERR - KEY UNWRAP ERROR , sticky, cleared only with reset or flush 0b0..No error 0b1..Error

key_unwrap_err - KEY UNWRAP ERROR , sticky, cleared only with reset or flush

◆ SGI_SGI_KEYCHK_KEYCHKSUM [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_KEYCHK_KEYCHKSUM (   x)

KEYCHKSUM - Key checksum (32-bit).

keychksum - Key checksum (32-bit).

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_START [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_START (   x)

START - Start crypto operation 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start operation

start - Start crypto operation 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start operation

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_DECRYPT [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_DECRYPT (   x)

DECRYPT - Sets Cipher direction(AES and DES) 0b0..Encryption 0b1..Decryption

decrypt - Sets Cipher direction(AES and DES) 0b0..Encryption 0b1..Decryption

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_AESKEYSZ [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_AESKEYSZ (   x)

AESKEYSZ 0b00..AES-128 0b10..AES-256 0b11..RFU (defaults to AES-128)

AESKEYSZ 0b00..AES-128 0b01..AES-192 0b10..AES-256 0b11..RFU (defaults to AES-128)

aeskeysz 0b00..AES-128 0b10..AES-256 0b11..RFU (defaults to AES-128)

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_CRYPTO_OP [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_CRYPTO_OP (   x)

CRYPTO_OP - Sets 'Crypto Operation' type 0b000..AES 0b001..DES (If Included) 0b010..TDES (If Included) 0b011..GFMUL(If Included) 0b100..SHA2 (If Included) 0b101..CMAC (If Included) 0b110-0b111..others - RFU (Defaults to 1st available OP)

crypto_op - Sets 'Crypto Operation' type 0b000..AES 0b001..DES (If Included) 0b010..TDES (If Included) 0b011..GFMUL(If Included) 0b100..SHA2 (If Included) 0b101..CMAC (If Included) 0b110-0b111..others - RFU (Defaults to 1st available OP)

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_INSEL [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_INSEL (   x)

INSEL 0b0000..DATIN[0] 0b0001..DATIN[1]* 0b0010..DATIN[2]* 0b0011..DATIN[3]* 0b0100..DATIN[0] ^ DATOUT 0b0101..DATIN[1] ^ DATOUT* 0b0110..DATIN[2] ^ DATOUT* 0b0111..DATIN[3] ^ DATOUT* 0b1000..DATOUT 0b1001-0b1111..others - DATIN[0] * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

insel 0b0000..DATIN[0] 0b0001..DATIN[1]* 0b0010..DATIN[2]* 0b0011..DATIN[3]* 0b0100..DATIN[0] ^ DATOUT 0b0101..DATIN[1] ^ DATOUT* 0b0110..DATIN[2] ^ DATOUT* 0b0111..DATIN[3] ^ DATOUT* 0b1000..DATOUT 0b1001-0b1111..others - DATIN[0] * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_OUTSEL [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_OUTSEL (   x)

OUTSEL 0b000..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' 0b001..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[0] 0b010..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[1]* 0b011..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[2]* 0b100..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^DATIN[3]* 0b101-0b111..others - DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

outsel 0b000..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' 0b001..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[0] 0b010..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[1]* 0b011..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[2]* 0b100..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^DATIN[3]* 0b101-0b111..others - DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

inkeysel - Input key selection

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_NO_KL (   x)

AES_NO_KL 0b0..new AES key will be loaded 0b1..No AES key will be loaded, and previously loaded key will be used.

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_SEL (   x)

AES_SEL 0b0..First AES selected 0b1..Second AES selected (when enabled)

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_FLUSH [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_FLUSH (   x)

FLUSH - Start Full SGI Flush 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start flush

flush - Start Full SGI Flush 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start flush

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_KEY_FLUSH (   x)

KEY_FLUSH - Start KEY register-bank Flush 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start flush

#define SGI_SGI_INT_ENABLE_INT_EN (   x)

INT_EN - Interrupt enable bit

int_en - Interrupt enable bit

◆ SGI_SGI_INT_STATUS_CLR_INT_CLR [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_INT_STATUS_CLR_INT_CLR (   x)

INT_CLR - Write to clear interrupt status flag (SGI_INT_STATUS.INT_PDONE=0).

int_clr - Write to clear interrupt status flag (SGI_INT_STATUS.INT_PDONE=0).

◆ SGI_SGI_INT_STATUS_SET_INT_SET [1/4]

#define SGI_SGI_INT_STATUS_SET_INT_SET (   x)

INT_SET - Write to set interrupt status flag (SGI_INT_STATUS.INT_PDONE=1) to trigger a SGI interrupt via software, e.g. for debug purposes.

int_set - Write to set interrupt status flag (SGI_INT_STATUS.INT_PDONE=1) to trigger a SGI interrupt via software, e.g. for debug purposes.

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_BUSY [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_BUSY (   x)

BUSY 0b0..Not busy 0b1..Busy

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_OFLOW [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_OFLOW (   x)

OFLOW - Overflow in INCR operation flag 0b0..Clear the flag 0b0..No overflow 0b1..No effect 0b1..Overflow

oflow - Overflow in INCR operation flag

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_PRNG_RDY [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_PRNG_RDY (   x)

PRNG_RDY 0b0..Not ready 0b1..Ready

prng_rdy - prng is ready after boot-up-phase

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_ERROR [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_ERROR (   x)

ERROR - Error detected 0b000..Error (all values other than 0x05 indicate ERROR) 0b101..No error

error - Error detected 0b000..ERROR (all values other than 0x05 indicate ERROR) 0b101..NO_ERROR

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA2_BUSY [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA2_BUSY (   x)

SHA2_BUSY 0b0..Not busy 0b1..Busy

sha2_busy - SHA2 is busy

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_IRQ [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_IRQ (   x)

IRQ 0b0..Clear the flag 0b0..No IRQ 0b1..IRQ 0b1..No effect

irq - interrupt detected

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_FIFO_FULL [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_FIFO_FULL (   x)

SHA_FIFO_FULL 0b0..Not full 0b1..Full

sha_fifo_full - SHA FIFO is full(operates in SHA AUTO mode)

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_FIFO_LEVEL [2/3]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_FIFO_LEVEL (   x)

sha_fifo_level - SHA FIFO level

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_ERROR [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_ERROR (   x)

SHA_ERROR 0b0..No error 0b1..Error

sha_error - SHA ERROR

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_KEY_READ_ERR [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_KEY_READ_ERR (   x)

KEY_READ_ERR - KEY SFR READ ERROR, sticky, cleared only with reset or flush 0b0..No error 0b1..Error

key_read_err - KEY SFR READ ERROR, sticky, cleared only with reset or flush

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_KEY_UNWRAP_ERR [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_KEY_UNWRAP_ERR (   x)

KEY_UNWRAP_ERR - KEY UNWRAP ERROR , sticky, cleared only with reset or flush 0b0..No error 0b1..Error

key_unwrap_err - KEY UNWRAP ERROR , sticky, cleared only with reset or flush

◆ SGI_SGI_KEYCHK_KEYCHKSUM [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_KEYCHK_KEYCHKSUM (   x)

KEYCHKSUM - Key checksum (32-bit).

keychksum - Key checksum (32-bit).

◆ SGI_SGI_PRNG_SW_READ_RANDOM [1/2]

#define SGI_SGI_PRNG_SW_READ_RANDOM (   x)

RANDOM - 32-bit field to return random data from PRNG

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_START [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_START (   x)

START - Start crypto operation 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start operation

start - Start crypto operation 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start operation

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_DECRYPT [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_DECRYPT (   x)

DECRYPT - Sets Cipher direction(AES and DES) 0b0..Encryption 0b1..Decryption

decrypt - Sets Cipher direction(AES and DES) 0b0..Encryption 0b1..Decryption

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_AESKEYSZ [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_AESKEYSZ (   x)

AESKEYSZ 0b00..AES-128 0b01..AES-192 0b10..AES-256 0b11..RFU (defaults to AES-128)

aeskeysz 0b00..AES-128 0b10..AES-256 0b11..RFU (defaults to AES-128)

AESKEYSZ 0b00..AES-128 0b10..AES-256 0b11..RFU (defaults to AES-128)

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_CRYPTO_OP [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_CRYPTO_OP (   x)

CRYPTO_OP - Sets 'Crypto Operation' type 0b000..AES 0b001..DES (If Included) 0b010..TDES (If Included) 0b011..GFMUL(If Included) 0b100..SHA2 (If Included) 0b101..CMAC (If Included) 0b110-0b111..others - RFU (Defaults to 1st available OP)

crypto_op - Sets 'Crypto Operation' type 0b000..AES 0b001..DES (If Included) 0b010..TDES (If Included) 0b011..GFMUL(If Included) 0b100..SHA2 (If Included) 0b101..CMAC (If Included) 0b110-0b111..others - RFU (Defaults to 1st available OP)

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_INSEL [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_INSEL (   x)

INSEL 0b0000..DATIN[0] 0b0001..DATIN[1]* 0b0010..DATIN[2]* 0b0011..DATIN[3]* 0b0100..DATIN[0] ^ DATOUT 0b0101..DATIN[1] ^ DATOUT* 0b0110..DATIN[2] ^ DATOUT* 0b0111..DATIN[3] ^ DATOUT* 0b1000..DATOUT 0b1001-0b1111..others - DATIN[0] * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

insel 0b0000..DATIN[0] 0b0001..DATIN[1]* 0b0010..DATIN[2]* 0b0011..DATIN[3]* 0b0100..DATIN[0] ^ DATOUT 0b0101..DATIN[1] ^ DATOUT* 0b0110..DATIN[2] ^ DATOUT* 0b0111..DATIN[3] ^ DATOUT* 0b1000..DATOUT 0b1001-0b1111..others - DATIN[0] * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_OUTSEL [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_OUTSEL (   x)

OUTSEL 0b000..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' 0b001..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[0] 0b010..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[1]* 0b011..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[2]* 0b100..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^DATIN[3]* 0b101-0b111..others - DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

outsel 0b000..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' 0b001..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[0] 0b010..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[1]* 0b011..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[2]* 0b100..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^DATIN[3]* 0b101-0b111..others - DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_DATOUT_RES [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_DATOUT_RES (   x)

DATOUT_RES 0b00..END_UP 0b01..START_UP 0b10..TRIGGER_UP 0b11..NO_UP

datout_res 0b00..END_UP 0b01..START_UP 0b10..TRIGGER_UP 0b11..NO_UP

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_EN [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_EN (   x)

AES_EN 0b0..AES disabled 0b1..AES enabled

aes_en 0b0..AES disabled 0b1..AES enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_DES_EN [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_DES_EN (   x)

DES_EN 0b0..DES disabled 0b1..DES enabled

des_en 0b0..DES disabled 0b1..DES enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_GCM_EN [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_GCM_EN (   x)

GCM_EN 0b0..GFMUL disabled 0b1..GFMUL enabled

gcm_en 0b0..GFMUL disabled 0b1..GFMUL enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_PRNG_EN [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_PRNG_EN (   x)

PRNG_EN - PRNG Enable (only if SGI has internal PRNG) 0b0..PRNG Disabled 0b1..PRNG Enabled

prng_en - PRNG Enable (only if SGI has internal PRNG) 0b0..PRNG Disabled 0b1..PRNG Enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_INKEYSEL [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_INKEYSEL (   x)

INKEYSEL - Input key selection

inkeysel - Input key selection

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_TDESKEY [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_TDESKEY (   x)

TDESKEY 0b0..2-key TDES 0b1..3-key TDES

tdeskey 0b0..2-key TDES 0b1..3-key TDES

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_NO_KL [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_NO_KL (   x)

AES_NO_KL 0b0..new AES key will be loaded 0b1..No AES key will be loaded, and previously loaded key will be used.

aes_no_kl 0b0..new AES key will be loaded 0b1..No AES key will be loaded, and previously loaded key will be used.

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_SEL [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_SEL (   x)

AES_SEL 0b0..First AES selected 0b1..Second AES selected (when enabled)

aes_sel 0b0..First AES selected 0b1..Second AES selected (when enabled)

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_FLUSH [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_FLUSH (   x)

FLUSH - Start Full SGI Flush 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start flush

flush - Start Full SGI Flush 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start flush

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_KEY_FLUSH [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_KEY_FLUSH (   x)

KEY_FLUSH - Start KEY register-bank Flush 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start flush

key_flush - Start KEY register-bank Flush 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start flush

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_DATIN_FLUSH [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_DATIN_FLUSH (   x)

DATIN_FLUSH - Start DATIN register-bank Flush 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start flush

datin_flush - Start DATIN register-bank Flush 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start flush

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_INCR [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_INCR (   x)

INCR - Increment(Triggered by SFR write) 0b0..INCR-On-Write disabled 0b1..INCR-On-Write enabled

incr - Increment(Triggered by SFR write) 0b0..INCR-On-Write disabled 0b1..INCR-On-Write enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_XORWR [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_XORWR (   x)

XORWR - Write-XOR control 0b0..XOR-On-Write disabled 0b1..XOR-On-Write enabled

xorwr - Write-XOR control 0b0..XOR-On-Write disabled 0b1..XOR-On-Write enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_FLUSHWR [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_FLUSHWR (   x)

FLUSHWR - Flush Write control 0b0..Flush-Write disabled 0b1..Flush-Write enabled

flushwr - Flush Write control 0b0..Flush-Write disabled 0b1..Flush-Write enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_INCR_CIN [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_INCR_CIN (   x)

INCR_CIN - Increment Carry-In control 0b0..Carry-In for INCR is 1 0b1..Carry-In for INCR is overflow from previous INCR operation

incr_cin - Increment Carry-In control 0b0..Carry-In for INCR is 1 0b1..Carry-In for INCR is overflow from previous INCR operation

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_SMASKEN [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_SMASKEN (   x)

SMASKEN - SFRMASK Enable 0b0..SFRMASK feature Disabled 0b1..SFRMASK feature Enabled

smasken - SFRMASK Enable 0b0..SFRMASK feature Disabled 0b1..SFRMASK feature Enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_SMASKSTEP [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_SMASKSTEP (   x)

SMASKSTEP - SFRSEED increment control 0b0..SFRSEED increments every regbank access 0b1..SFRSEED increments every regbank access PLUS when SFRSEED in read

smaskstep - SFRSEED increment control 0b0..SFRSEED increments every regbank access 0b1..SFRSEED increments every regbank access PLUS when SFRSEED in read

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_SMASKSW [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_SMASKSW (   x)

SMASKSW - SFRMASK MASK control 0b0..SFR MASK output directly controlled by HW mask generator 0b1..SFR MASK output directly controlled by SW

smasksw - SFRMASK MASK control 0b0..SFR MASK output directly controlled by HW mask generator 0b1..SFR MASK output directly controlled by SW

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_MOVEM [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_MOVEM (   x)

MOVEM - 4-bit optional input for MOVEM feature

movem - 4-bit optional input for MOVEM feature

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_KEYRES [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_KEYRES (   x)

KEYRES - Selects key registers to be updated when rkey=1

keyres - Selects key registers to be updated when rkey=1

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_RKEY [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_RKEY (   x)

RKEY - Crypto result location 0b0..DATOUT register bank 0b1..KEY register bank

rkey - Crypto result location 0b0..DATOUT register bank 0b1..KEY register bank

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_BYTES_ORDER [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_BYTES_ORDER (   x)

BYTES_ORDER - Byte order of regbank read/write data 0b0..Normal 0b1..Swapped

bytes_order - Byte order of regbank read/write data 0b0..Normal 0b1..Swapped

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_GCM_INXOR [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_GCM_INXOR (   x)

GCM_INXOR - GCM INXOR 0b0..GCM INXOR disabled 0b1..GCM INXOR enabled

gcm_inxor - GCM INXOR 0b0..GCM INXOR disabled 0b1..GCM INXOR enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_SFRSEED_SFRSEED [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SFRSEED_SFRSEED (   x)

SFRSEED - Seed/mask used for sw level masking

sfrseed - Seed/mask used for sw level masking

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_EN [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_EN (   x)

SHA2_EN - SHA enable 0b0..SHA disabled 0b1..SHA enabled

sha2_en - SHA enable 0b0..SHA disabled 0b1..SHA enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_MODE [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_MODE (   x)

SHA2_MODE - SHA mode normal or automatic 0b0..SHA NORM Mode 0b1..SHA AUTO Mode

sha2_mode - SHA mode normal or automatic 0b0..SHA NORM Mode 0b1..SHA AUTO Mode

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_SIZE [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_SIZE (   x)

SHA2_SIZE 0b00..SHA-224 0b01..SHA-256 0b10..SHA-384(or SHA-224 if SHA-256 only) 0b11..SHA-512 (or SHA-256 if SHA-256 only)

sha2_size 0b00..SHA-224 0b01..SHA-256 0b10..SHA-384(or SHA-224 if SHA-256 only) 0b11..SHA-512 (or SHA-256 if SHA-256 only)

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_LOW_LIM [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_LOW_LIM (   x)

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_COUNT_EN [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_COUNT_EN (   x)

SHA2_COUNT_EN - SHA Calculation counter enable 0b0..SHA operation DOES NOT increment COUNT 0b1..SHA operation DOES increment count

sha2_count_en - SHA Calculation counter enable 0b0..SHA operation DOES NOT increment COUNT 0b1..SHA operation DOES increment count

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_HASH_RELOAD [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_HASH_RELOAD (   x)

HASH_RELOAD - SHA HASH reload 0b0..No HASH reload 0b1..HASH reload enabled

hash_reload - SHA HASH reload 0b0..No HASH reload 0b1..HASH reload enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_STOP [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_STOP (   x)

SHA2_STOP - STOP SHA AUTO mode 0b0..Keep running 0b1..Stop auto mode

sha2_stop - STOP SHA AUTO mode 0b0..Keep running 0b1..Stop auto mode

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_NO_AUTO_INIT [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_NO_AUTO_INIT (   x)

NO_AUTO_INIT - SHA no automatic HASH initialisation 0b0..SHA automatic HASH initialisation 0b1..No SHA automatic HASH initialisation

no_auto_init - SHA no automatic HASH initialisation 0b0..SHA automatic HASH initialisation 0b1..No SHA automatic HASH initialisation

fifo - SHA FIFO register

#define SGI_SGI_CONFIG2_AES_USED (   x)

AES_USED 0b0000..Apollo 0b0001..Aegis 0b0010..Ayna 0b0011..Athenium 0b0100..Ajax 0b0101..Aegis_hs 0b0110..Athenium_hs 0b0111..ATE 0b1000..ATOM 0b1001..Asterix 0b1010-0b1111..RFU

AES_NUM_SBOXES - Number of AES sboxes

#define SGI_SGI_CONFIG2_AES_KEYSIZE (   x)

AES_KEYSIZE 0b00..128 0nly 0b01..192 only 0b10..256 only 0b11..All key sizes

aes_keysize 0b00..128 0nly 0b10..256 only 0b11..All key sizes

AES_KEYSIZE 0b00..128 0nly 0b10..256 only 0b11..All key sizes

auto_mode_en - auto_start_en 0b1..auto mode has been selected

◆ SGI_SGI_AUTO_MODE_AUTO_MODE_STOP [2/4]

auto_mode_stop - auto_mode_stop 0b1..exit auto mode as soon as the data has been emptied

◆ SGI_SGI_AUTO_MODE_INCR_MODE [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_AUTO_MODE_INCR_MODE (   x)

INCR_MODE - CTR increment mode 0b00..2**32 increment mode 0b01..2**64 increment mode 0b10..2**96 increment mode 0b11..2**128 increment mode

incr_mode - CTR increment mode 0b00..2**32 increment mode 0b01..2**64 increment mode 0b10..2**96 increment mode 0b11..2**128 increment mode

◆ SGI_SGI_AUTO_MODE_CMD [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_AUTO_MODE_CMD (   x)

CMD - Auto mode of operation 0b00000000..ECB mode 0b00000001..CTR mode 0b00000010..CBC mode 0b00000011..CBCMAC mode 0b00010000..Key Wrap/Unwrap (128 bit key data) 0b00010001..Key Wrap/Unwrap (256 bit key data)

cmd - Auto mode of operation 0b00000000..ECB mode 0b00000001..CTR mode 0b00000010..CBC mode 0b00000011..CBCMAC mode 0b00010000..Key Wrap/Unwrap (128 bit key data) 0b00010001..Key Wrap/Unwrap (256 bit key data)

◆ SGI_SGI_AUTO_DMA_CTRL_IFE [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_AUTO_DMA_CTRL_IFE (   x)

IFE - Input FIFO DMA Enable 0b0..DMA handshake disabled 0b1..DMA handshake enabled

ife - Input FIFO DMA Enable 0b0..DMA handshake disabled 0b1..DMA handshake enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_AUTO_DMA_CTRL_OFE [2/4]

#define SGI_SGI_AUTO_DMA_CTRL_OFE (   x)

OFE - Ouput FIFO DMA Enable 0b0..DMA handshake disabled 0b1..DMA handshake enabled

ofe - Ouput FIFO DMA Enable 0b0..DMA handshake disabled 0b1..DMA handshake enabled

z - Extended revision number in X.Y1Y2.Z, e.g. 1.20.3.

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_OFLOW (   x)

oflow - Overflow in INCR operation flag

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_ERROR [3/4]

error - Error detected 0b000..ERROR (all values other than 0x05 indicate ERROR) 0b101..NO_ERROR

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_AESKEYSZ [3/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_AESKEYSZ (   x)

aeskeysz 0b00..AES-128 0b10..AES-256 0b11..RFU (defaults to AES-128)

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_CRYPTO_OP [3/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_CRYPTO_OP (   x)

crypto_op - Sets 'Crypto Operation' type 0b000..AES 0b001..DES (If Included) 0b010..TDES (If Included) 0b011..GFMUL(If Included) 0b100..SHA2 (If Included) 0b101..CMAC (If Included) 0b110-0b111..others - RFU (Defaults to 1st available OP)

CRYPTO_OP - Sets 'Crypto Operation' type 0b000..AES 0b001..DES (If Included) 0b010..TDES (If Included) 0b011..GFMUL(If Included) 0b100..SHA2 (If Included) 0b101..CMAC (If Included) 0b110-0b111..others - RFU (Defaults to 1st available OP)

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_INSEL [3/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_INSEL (   x)

insel 0b0000..DATIN[0] 0b0001..DATIN[1]* 0b0010..DATIN[2]* 0b0011..DATIN[3]* 0b0100..DATIN[0] ^ DATOUT 0b0101..DATIN[1] ^ DATOUT* 0b0110..DATIN[2] ^ DATOUT* 0b0111..DATIN[3] ^ DATOUT* 0b1000..DATOUT 0b1001-0b1111..others - DATIN[0] * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

INSEL 0b0000..DATIN[0] 0b0001..DATIN[1]* 0b0010..DATIN[2]* 0b0011..DATIN[3]* 0b0100..DATIN[0] ^ DATOUT 0b0101..DATIN[1] ^ DATOUT* 0b0110..DATIN[2] ^ DATOUT* 0b0111..DATIN[3] ^ DATOUT* 0b1000..DATOUT 0b1001-0b1111..others - DATIN[0] * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_OUTSEL [3/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_OUTSEL (   x)

outsel 0b000..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' 0b001..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[0] 0b010..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[1]* 0b011..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[2]* 0b100..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^DATIN[3]* 0b101-0b111..others - DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

OUTSEL 0b000..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' 0b001..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[0] 0b010..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[1]* 0b011..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[2]* 0b100..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^DATIN[3]* 0b101-0b111..others - DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

aes_no_kl 0b0..new AES key will be loaded 0b1..No AES key will be loaded, and previously loaded key will be used.

#define SGI_SGI_AUTO_MODE_CMD (   x)

cmd - Auto mode of operation 0b00000000..ECB mode 0b00000001..CTR mode 0b00000010..CBC mode 0b00000011..CBCMAC mode 0b00010000..Key Wrap/Unwrap (128 bit key data) 0b00010001..Key Wrap/Unwrap (256 bit key data)

CMD - Auto mode of operation 0b00000000..ECB mode 0b00000001..CTR mode 0b00000010..CBC mode 0b00000011..CBCMAC mode 0b00010000..Key Wrap/Unwrap (128 bit key data) 0b00010001..Key Wrap/Unwrap (256 bit key data)

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_BUSY [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_BUSY (   x)

BUSY 0b0..Not busy 0b1..Busy

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_OFLOW [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_OFLOW (   x)

OFLOW - Overflow in INCR operation flag 0b0..Clear the flag 0b0..No overflow 0b1..No effect 0b1..Overflow

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_PRNG_RDY [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_PRNG_RDY (   x)

PRNG_RDY 0b0..Not ready 0b1..Ready

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_ERROR [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_ERROR (   x)

ERROR - Error detected 0b000..Error (all values other than 0x05 indicate ERROR) 0b101..No error

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA2_BUSY [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA2_BUSY (   x)

SHA2_BUSY 0b0..Not busy 0b1..Busy

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_IRQ [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_IRQ (   x)

IRQ 0b0..Clear the flag 0b0..No IRQ 0b1..IRQ 0b1..No effect

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_FIFO_FULL [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_FIFO_FULL (   x)

SHA_FIFO_FULL 0b0..Not full 0b1..Full

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_ERROR [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_SHA_ERROR (   x)

SHA_ERROR 0b0..No error 0b1..Error

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_KEY_READ_ERR [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_KEY_READ_ERR (   x)

KEY_READ_ERR - KEY SFR READ ERROR, sticky, cleared only with reset or flush 0b0..No error 0b1..Error

◆ SGI_SGI_STATUS_KEY_UNWRAP_ERR [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_STATUS_KEY_UNWRAP_ERR (   x)

KEY_UNWRAP_ERR - KEY UNWRAP ERROR , sticky, cleared only with reset or flush 0b0..No error 0b1..Error

◆ SGI_SGI_KEYCHK_KEYCHKSUM [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_KEYCHK_KEYCHKSUM (   x)

KEYCHKSUM - Key checksum (32-bit).

◆ SGI_SGI_PRNG_SW_READ_RANDOM [2/2]

#define SGI_SGI_PRNG_SW_READ_RANDOM (   x)

RANDOM - 32-bit field to return random data from PRNG

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_START [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_START (   x)

START - Start crypto operation 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start operation

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_DECRYPT [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_DECRYPT (   x)

DECRYPT - Sets Cipher direction(AES and DES) 0b0..Encryption 0b1..Decryption

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_AESKEYSZ [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_AESKEYSZ (   x)

AESKEYSZ 0b00..AES-128 0b10..AES-256 0b11..RFU (defaults to AES-128)

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_CRYPTO_OP [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_CRYPTO_OP (   x)

CRYPTO_OP - Sets 'Crypto Operation' type 0b000..AES 0b001..DES (If Included) 0b010..TDES (If Included) 0b011..GFMUL(If Included) 0b100..SHA2 (If Included) 0b101..CMAC (If Included) 0b110-0b111..others - RFU (Defaults to 1st available OP)

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_INSEL [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_INSEL (   x)

INSEL 0b0000..DATIN[0] 0b0001..DATIN[1]* 0b0010..DATIN[2]* 0b0011..DATIN[3]* 0b0100..DATIN[0] ^ DATOUT 0b0101..DATIN[1] ^ DATOUT* 0b0110..DATIN[2] ^ DATOUT* 0b0111..DATIN[3] ^ DATOUT* 0b1000..DATOUT 0b1001-0b1111..others - DATIN[0] * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_OUTSEL [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_OUTSEL (   x)

OUTSEL 0b000..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' 0b001..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[0] 0b010..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[1]* 0b011..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^ DATIN[2]* 0b100..DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' ^DATIN[3]* 0b101-0b111..others - DATOUT = 'Kernel Res' * - only if DATIN[num] exists, else [0]

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_DATOUT_RES [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_DATOUT_RES (   x)

DATOUT_RES 0b00..END_UP 0b01..START_UP 0b10..TRIGGER_UP 0b11..NO_UP

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_EN [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_EN (   x)

AES_EN 0b0..AES disabled 0b1..AES enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_DES_EN [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_DES_EN (   x)

DES_EN 0b0..DES disabled 0b1..DES enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_GCM_EN [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_GCM_EN (   x)

GCM_EN 0b0..GFMUL disabled 0b1..GFMUL enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_PRNG_EN [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_PRNG_EN (   x)

PRNG_EN - PRNG Enable (only if SGI has internal PRNG) 0b0..PRNG Disabled 0b1..PRNG Enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_INKEYSEL [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_INKEYSEL (   x)

INKEYSEL - Input key selection

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_TDESKEY [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_TDESKEY (   x)

TDESKEY 0b0..2-key TDES 0b1..3-key TDES

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_NO_KL [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_NO_KL (   x)

AES_NO_KL 0b0..new AES key will be loaded 0b1..No AES key will be loaded, and previously loaded key will be used.

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_SEL [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL_AES_SEL (   x)

AES_SEL 0b0..First AES selected 0b1..Second AES selected (when enabled)

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_FLUSH [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_FLUSH (   x)

FLUSH - Start Full SGI Flush 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start flush

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_KEY_FLUSH [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_KEY_FLUSH (   x)

KEY_FLUSH - Start KEY register-bank Flush 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start flush

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_DATIN_FLUSH [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_DATIN_FLUSH (   x)

DATIN_FLUSH - Start DATIN register-bank Flush 0b0..Clr has no effect 0b1..Set to start flush

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_INCR [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_INCR (   x)

INCR - Increment(Triggered by SFR write) 0b0..INCR-On-Write disabled 0b1..INCR-On-Write enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_XORWR [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_XORWR (   x)

XORWR - Write-XOR control 0b0..XOR-On-Write disabled 0b1..XOR-On-Write enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_FLUSHWR [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_FLUSHWR (   x)

FLUSHWR - Flush Write control 0b0..Flush-Write disabled 0b1..Flush-Write enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_INCR_CIN [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_INCR_CIN (   x)

INCR_CIN - Increment Carry-In control 0b0..Carry-In for INCR is 1 0b1..Carry-In for INCR is overflow from previous INCR operation

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_SMASKEN [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_SMASKEN (   x)

SMASKEN - SFRMASK Enable 0b0..SFRMASK feature Disabled 0b1..SFRMASK feature Enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_SMASKSTEP [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_SMASKSTEP (   x)

SMASKSTEP - SFRSEED increment control 0b0..SFRSEED increments every regbank access 0b1..SFRSEED increments every regbank access PLUS when SFRSEED in read

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_SMASKSW [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_SMASKSW (   x)

SMASKSW - SFRMASK MASK control 0b0..SFR MASK output directly controlled by HW mask generator 0b1..SFR MASK output directly controlled by SW

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_MOVEM [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_MOVEM (   x)

MOVEM - 4-bit optional input for MOVEM feature

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_KEYRES [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_KEYRES (   x)

KEYRES - Selects key registers to be updated when rkey=1

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_RKEY [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_RKEY (   x)

RKEY - Crypto result location 0b0..DATOUT register bank 0b1..KEY register bank

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_BYTES_ORDER [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_BYTES_ORDER (   x)

BYTES_ORDER - Byte order of regbank read/write data 0b0..Normal 0b1..Swapped

◆ SGI_SGI_CTRL2_GCM_INXOR [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_CTRL2_GCM_INXOR (   x)

GCM_INXOR - GCM INXOR 0b0..GCM INXOR disabled 0b1..GCM INXOR enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_SFRSEED_SFRSEED [4/4]

SFRSEED - Seed/mask used for sw level masking

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_EN (   x)

SHA2_EN - SHA enable 0b0..SHA disabled 0b1..SHA enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_MODE [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_MODE (   x)

SHA2_MODE - SHA mode normal or automatic 0b0..SHA NORM Mode 0b1..SHA AUTO Mode

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_SIZE [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_SIZE (   x)

SHA2_SIZE 0b00..SHA-224 0b01..SHA-256 0b10..SHA-384(or SHA-224 if SHA-256 only) 0b11..SHA-512 (or SHA-256 if SHA-256 only)

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_LOW_LIM [4/4]

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_COUNT_EN [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_COUNT_EN (   x)

SHA2_COUNT_EN - SHA Calculation counter enable 0b0..SHA operation DOES NOT increment COUNT 0b1..SHA operation DOES increment count

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_HASH_RELOAD [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_HASH_RELOAD (   x)

HASH_RELOAD - SHA HASH reload 0b0..No HASH reload 0b1..HASH reload enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_STOP [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_SHA2_STOP (   x)

SHA2_STOP - STOP SHA AUTO mode 0b0..Keep running 0b1..Stop auto mode

◆ SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_NO_AUTO_INIT [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_SHA2_CTRL_NO_AUTO_INIT (   x)

#define SGI_SGI_CONFIG2_DES_USED (   x)

AUTO_MODE_EN - auto_start_en 0b1..auto mode has been selected

◆ SGI_SGI_AUTO_MODE_AUTO_MODE_STOP [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_AUTO_MODE_AUTO_MODE_STOP (   x)

AUTO_MODE_STOP - auto_mode_stop 0b1..exit auto mode as soon as the data has been emptied

◆ SGI_SGI_AUTO_MODE_INCR_MODE [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_AUTO_MODE_INCR_MODE (   x)

INCR_MODE - CTR increment mode 0b00..2**32 increment mode 0b01..2**64 increment mode 0b10..2**96 increment mode 0b11..2**128 increment mode

◆ SGI_SGI_AUTO_MODE_CMD [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_AUTO_MODE_CMD (   x)

CMD - Auto mode of operation 0b00000000..ECB mode 0b00000001..CTR mode 0b00000010..CBC mode 0b00000011..CBCMAC mode 0b00010000..Key Wrap/Unwrap (128 bit key data) 0b00010001..Key Wrap/Unwrap (256 bit key data)

◆ SGI_SGI_AUTO_DMA_CTRL_IFE [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_AUTO_DMA_CTRL_IFE (   x)

IFE - Input FIFO DMA Enable 0b0..DMA handshake disabled 0b1..DMA handshake enabled

◆ SGI_SGI_AUTO_DMA_CTRL_OFE [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_AUTO_DMA_CTRL_OFE (   x)

OFE - Ouput FIFO DMA Enable 0b0..DMA handshake disabled 0b1..DMA handshake enabled

#define SGI_SGI_KEY_WRAP_KW_DATA (   x)

KW_DATA - Field contains wrapped key, auto-updated by HW for each word

Z - Extended revision number in X.Y1Y2.Z, e.g. 1.20.3.

Y2 - Minor revision number 2 in X.Y1Y2.Z, e.g. 1.20.3.

Y1 - Minor revision number 1 in X.Y1Y2.Z, e.g. 1.20.3.

◆ SGI_SGI_INT_STATUS_SET_INT_SET [4/4]

#define SGI_SGI_INT_STATUS_SET_INT_SET (   x)
